note: Australian-produced. Grounded in the course's own modules. Founder to review before wiring live.

quizzes.title: CARSI Asbestos Awareness for Restoration — Knowledge Check

questions.questionText: At an awareness level, if you suspect asbestos you should…
options: Stop work, do not disturb it, and refer to a licensed professional
Wet it and bag it yourself
Ignore it if it looks intact

questions.questionText: Asbestos was fully banned in Australia from…
Buildings most likely to contain asbestos materials are…
The health risk from asbestos is driven by…
options: Inhaling airborne fibres — there is no known safe exposure level

questions.questionText: Your legal duty at awareness level is governed by…
options: Work Health and Safety law and Safe Work Australia guidance
